title: alchemilla vulgaris var. glaucescens
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. glaucescens, commonly known as the silver-leaved lady's mantle or alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris var. glaucescens include soothing and calming effects, which can help to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote wound healing. Alchemilla vulgaris var. glaucescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions.
